title: OrientationMod
description: This intricate and remarkably advanced mod allows you to seamlessly change your current in-game perspective (Pitch and Yaw) using a simple command.
body:
How to Use the Mod

This mod lets you control exactly where your character is looking by typing a simple command.

To change your view, type:

/orientation (yaw) (pitch)

Yaw changes the direction you are facing left or right.
It controls horizontal movement, like turning on a compass.
Positive and negative numbers turn you in opposite directions.
You can use whole numbers or decimals for more precise angles.

Pitch changes whether you are looking up or down.
Higher values usually make you look downward.
Lower or negative values make you look upward.
This is helpful when you need accurate camera angles for building, testing, or showing something clearly.

Example Commands

/orientation 90 0
/orientation 180 -30

As soon as you enter the command, your view changes instantly.

The mod also includes this command:

/orientation lock

When you use it, your current yaw and pitch are locked. Moving your mouse will no longer change your view. Your camera stays fixed in the same position.
This is useful for recording, testing mechanics, or keeping a steady camera angle while moving.
To return to normal movement, run the lock command again
